2604.27132.title: TRUST: A Framework for Decentralized AI Service v.0.1
2604.27132.paper_summary: Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) and Multi-Agent Systems (MAS) in high-stakes domains demand reliable verification, yet centralized approaches suffer four limitations: (1) Robustness, with single points of failure vulnerable to attacks and bias; (2) Scalability, as reasoning complexity creates bottlenecks; (3) Opacity, as hidden auditing erodes trust; and (4) Privacy, as exposed reasoning traces risk model theft. We introduce TRUST (Transparent, Robust, and Unified Services for Trustworthy AI), a decentralized framework with three innovations: (i) Hierarchical Directed Acyclic Graphs (HDAGs) that decompose Chain-of-Thought reasoning into five abstraction levels for parallel distributed auditing; (ii) the DAAN protocol, which projects multi-agent interactions into Causal Interaction Graphs (CIGs) for deterministic root-cause attribution; and (iii) a multi-tier consensus mechanism among computational checkers, LLM evaluators, and human experts with stake-weighted voting that guarantees correctness under 30% adversarial participation. We prove a Safety-Profitability Theorem ensuring honest auditors profit while malicious actors incur losses. All decisions are recorded on-chain, while privacy-by-design segmentation prevents reconstruction of proprietary logic. Across multiple LLMs and benchmarks, TRUST attains 72.4% accuracy (4-18% above baselines) and remains resilient against 20% corruption. DAAN reaches 70% root-cause attribution (vs. 54-63% for standard methods) with 60% token savings. Human studies validate the design (F1 = 0.89, Brier = 0.074). The framework supports (A1) decentralized auditing, (A2) tamper-proof leaderboards, (A3) trustless data annotation, and (A4) governed autonomous agents, pioneering decentralized AI auditing for safe, accountable deployment of reasoning-capable systems.
2604.27132.paper_summary_zh: 大型推理模型（LRMs）和多代理系統（MAS）在高風險領域需要可靠的驗證，但集中式方法存在四個限制：（1）穩健性，單點故障容易受到攻擊和偏見的影響；（2）可擴展性，推理的複雜性造成瓶頸；（3）不透明性，隱藏的審計侵蝕信任；以及（4）隱私，暴露的推理痕跡存在模型被盜的風險。我們介紹了TRUST（透明、穩健和統一的可信AI服務），這是一個去中心化的框架，具有三項創新：（i）層次化有向無環圖（HDAGs），將思維鏈推理分解為五個抽象層次以進行平行分佈式審計；（ii）DAAN協議，將多代理互動投影到因果互動圖（CIGs）中，以進行確定性的根本原因歸因；以及（iii）在計算檢查者、LLM評估者和人類專家之間的多層共識機制，通過權重投票保證在30%對手參與下的正確性。我們證明了一個安全-獲利定理，確保誠實的審計者獲利，而惡意行為者則承受損失。所有決策都在鏈上記錄，而設計隱私分段防止重建專有邏輯。在多個LLM和基準測試中，TRUST達到了72.4%的準確率（比基準高出4-18%），並且在20%的腐敗情況下仍然保持穩健。DAAN達到70%的根本原因歸因（相比標準方法的54-63%），並節省了60%的令牌。人類研究驗證了設計（F1 = 0.89，Brier = 0.074）。該框架支持（A1）去中心化審計，（A2）防篡改的排行榜，（A3）無信任的數據標註，以及（A4）受管控的自主代理，開創了去中心化AI審計，為安全、負責任地部署具推理能力的系統奠定了基礎。
2604.27132.author: Yu-Chao Huang et.al.
2604.27132.authors: Yu-Chao Huang, Zhen Tan, Mohan Zhang, Pingzhi Li, Zhuo Zhang, Tianlong Chen
